titleStmt.title: SII 27.106: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 106. (A.R. No. 349 of 1930-31.) EḌAMAṄGALA, PUTTUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 1) set up in the Pañchaliṅgēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1354, Paridhāvi, Kārttika śu. 1, Sunday, corresponding to 1432 A.D., October 25. The weekday however, was Saturday.

It registers the gift of a portion of paddy due to the king as siddhāya by the villagers of Eḍemaṅgala in Kaḍaba-nāḍu and also money for feeding four brāhmaṇas daily in the temple of that village. The gift was made by Rāmarasa of Kaḍaba, at the instance of Dēvarāja-voḍeya who was governing Maṅgalūru-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note:
On the top of the slab, to the left and right sides of the linga engraved the names of the deities, Nārasimha and Janārdana, thus:
śrīnā
rasiṁha
śrīja
nārddana
div.p:
svastiśrī gaṇapataE namā nama
stuṁga siraścuṁbi caṁdra cā
mara cāravē trailōkya nagarā
raṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbha
vē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakavarṣa 1354 saṁdu va
rttamāna paridhāvi saṁvatsarada kārti
ka śu 1 Ā śrīmanmahārājādhirāja
rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra pratāpa dēva
rāya mahārāyara nirūpadiṁ
dēvarājavoḍeyaru maṁgalūra rā
jyavanāḷuvalli Ā dēvarāja voḍeyaru
nirūpadiṁ kaḍabada rāmarasaru Ā
kaḍabada nāḍoḷagaṇa Eḍemaṁgalada
dēvastānadali nālvaru brāhmaṇarige nitya
sthitiyali Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi bhōjana
naḍavadake māḍida dharmaśāsanadakrama
veṁteṁdaḍe Āeḍemaṁgalada grāmada
varu Aramanege teṟuva siddāyada gu
ttageya bhattadoḷage kaḍabada mū
nūṟu parivāra sida ya jīvi
tadiṁ Uttārava māḍi Ā guttageya
bhattada voḷage Uttarisi koṭṭa bhattake
sige hadināḍaṟa baḷadali prati
mūḍe 1 kaṁ baḷa 35 terada mū 130 A
kṣaradalu nūṟamūvattu mūḍe bhatta
mūḍe sahavāgi I sthānadali nityasthiti
yali Uṁba brāhmaṇa jana 1 kke Utta
risi baha bhatta mūḍe 30 bhatta Ai
du kāṭigadyāṇa haṁneraḍu Ī
mariyādeyali naḍadu baha dhaṁ
rmmavanū dēvarājavoḍeyaru
pālisi pūrvvatoḍagi naḍeva brāṁ
haṇa bhōjanada jana mūṟu
Digital edition of SII 27.106 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
